positioning.one_line: Bristol electricians whose name is on the certificate - EICRs, consumer units, EV chargers and rewires done to standard and signed off, with the paperwork handed over.
positioning.why_this_angle: The trading name carries 'Compliance', and the evidence backs it: a review cites an EICR booked and done within a week [src:reviews.Sandi]; another cites an EV charger fitted with 'all the relevant certs provided' [src:reviews.Craig]; the photos show labelled consumer units with inspection records and dated boards [src:photos.02]. Most electrician sites lead on speed or price; this one leads on the part a homeowner or landlord actually has to prove - that the work is correct and certified.
differentiators: Certification-first: EICR reports and the relevant certificates handed over on completion [src:reviews.Craig][src:reviews.Sandi]
Two named electricians on the job, Pier and Jack, not a rotating crew [src:reviews.Craig][src:reviews.Sandi][src:reviews.Poppy][src:reviews.Dan]
Work left clean and tidy, jobs finished on time [src:reviews.Dan]
5.0 on Google across 21 reviews, every one five stars [src:google_rating][src:google_review_count]

audience.primary: Bristol homeowners, landlords and small commercial occupiers in and around BS5 who need electrical work that has to be certified - an EICR for a let or sale, a consumer-unit upgrade, an EV charger, or a fault put right safely.
jobs_to_be_done: Get a periodic inspection (EICR) and a report I can give a letting agent or buyer
Replace an old fuse board with a modern, labelled consumer unit
Have an EV charger installed and certified
Get a fault found and fixed without guesswork, with the work signed off

proof.note: No third-party certification badge (NICEIC/NAPIT/Part P) is evidenced - 0 verified directory probes - so no scheme badges are claimed. EICR / certificates are described as the work performed, evidenced in review bodies.

services_source_of_truth: Reviews + photos, not the broad Google categories. Google listed only 'Repairs and maintenance / Installations / Emergency callouts' (service_confidence: broad); the real, evidenced services are EICR & testing, consumer-unit upgrades, EV charger installs, rewires & new circuits, and fault-finding / repairs.

contact.hours_note: Reachable seven days a week, including emergencies

swap_test_intent: Every block is anchored on a JP-specific detail (EICR within a week, certs handed over, Pier & Jack by name, the labelled board in the photos, 5.0 from 21). It should not transplant onto another Bristol electrician without breaking.
